data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limiting options to reduce decision fatigue for a seamless user experience.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined UI design, concise navigation elements.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Attractive interfaces can enhance perceived usability and engagement.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites, so interfaces should follow common design patterns.
data.technical_spec: Familiar UI interactions, standard layout conventions.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements that are close together appear to be more related than elements that are spaced farther apart.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The time to acquire a target is a function of the distance and size of the target.
data.technical_spec: Large, easy-to-hit buttons for common actions.
